name: Juri “The Ghost”

sheet.name: Juri “The Ghost”
sheet.background_story:
Jori was Eoric's only legitimate child. He was a lonely boy, his thin complexion and pale skin made him an object of ridicule, he was nicknamed "the ghost"

Jori admired her father and was also afraid of him since he couldn't stand his weakness and made him go through brutal training to "tear the weakness out of his body"

At the age of 18, Jori follow his father's footsteps and became a knight of the gods of light. Soon his father confronted Detriti. Since that day he hasn't seen him anymore, but he has heard rumors, rumors that disturb him.

He won't rest until he finds his father.

description:

At the age of 18, Jori follow his father's footsteps and became a knight of the gods of light. Soon his father confronted Detriti. Since that day he hasn't seen him anymore, but he has heard rumors, rumors that disturb him.
